intro: Urban Sport is positioned as a premium club environment for high-value private and corporate sessions, with a clean inquiry flow and stronger event packaging.
formIntro: Tell us about your event and the club team will shape a premium proposal around venue, format, and hospitality.
benefits: Premium venue environment with club-level hospitality
Structured event programming from social rounds to sponsor activations
Brand exposure through tournaments, digital placement, and venue presence

eventTypes.title: Corporate
eventTypes.description: Team days, sponsor activations, and hospitality-led court programming.

eventTypes.title: Private
eventTypes.description: Premium social sessions, birthdays, and curated club takeovers.

eventTypes.title: Team Building
eventTypes.description: Structured rounds, coaching touchpoints, and branded experiences across both sites.
